steps.title: Substitute directly
steps.content: The question gives $x=35$ and asks for $x+8$. Replace $x$ with $35$: $$x+8=35+8.$$

steps.title: Compute and compare
steps.content: $35+8=43$, so the target value is $43$. An incorrect response subtracts $8$, an incorrect response stops at $x$, and an incorrect response reverses the digits of the correct value. C is correct.
